name: West Bank Golf Club
address: 2111 Center St Unit D, Cleveland, OH 44113
about: West Bank Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator and bar located in Downtown Cleveland. It is the first and only venue of its kind in the city, combining a realistic golf experience with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility offers hourly rentals of its golf bays and provides a venue for private events and corporate bookings. West Bank Golf Club aims to bring the course and clubhouse together, creating a unique environment for both golf practice and social relaxation.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic golf experience with video analysis of club face and ball strike
Unique atmosphere combining golf course and clubhouse elements
Convenient downtown Cleveland location in the West Bank of the Flats
In-depth launch monitor technology for swing analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with an extensive drink selection

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator offering detailed video analysis of club face and ball strike

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but as a simulator venue, they likely provide club rentals. Contact them directly for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, West Bank Golf Club has an on-site kitchen and full bar. Outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time for 18 holes, but it depends on the number of people in your group and simulator speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendliness, but it offers a casual atmosphere and could be suitable for families with older children.
